programs.title: The Nanny
programs.desc: While examining Grace for symptoms of the flu, the doctor takes a look at Fran's throat and immediately orders her to the hospital to have her tonsils removed. Meanwhile, C.C. convinces Maxwell to attend her college reunion -- as her "amour," but her plans are foiled when Maxwell stands her up in order to stay by Fran's bedside.
